modules.name: setup
documentation: !/usr/bin/env python

functions.name: cssbeautifier.css.beautifier.default_options
documentation: WORD_RE = re.compile("[\w$\-_]")

methods.name: cssbeautifier.css.beautifier.Beautifier.eatWhitespace
documentation: Skips any white space in the source text from the current position.
When allowAtLeastOneNewLine is true, will output new lines for each
newline character found; if the user has preserve_newlines off, only
the first newline will be output

methods.name: cssbeautifier.css.beautifier.Beautifier.foundNestedPseudoClass
documentation: Nested pseudo-class if we are insideRule
and the next special character found opens
a new block
